violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sushi and prep concentrations too low.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -No items have been date marked in any cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Wooden pallet used for storage needs painted.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Vent hood was not operating.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Need in Sushi cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelving in 1 door fridge needs replaced as it is rusty.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers, prep tables and spice bins.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen, walk in cooler and in storage. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Hood and filters need cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a warewash sink.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration: No sanitizer in sink.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Boxes of plastic containers stored on floor.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -3 compartment sink faucet does not shut off completely. -Drain on handwash sink leaks.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Main kitchen handwash sink water shut off.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -No soap at soda station handwash.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. -Not working in men's room.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. -Sheet rock is missing in kitchen cook and prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire back area needs deep cleaned.
Lighting. — --Existing light fixtures did not provide adequate illumination in cook and prep areas.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back screen door does not close tightly.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Mouse droppings were prevalent in food storage areas.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area: Employee eating at sushi prep table.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor: Bag of Panko and bag of onions on floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution at proper concentration between uses. Sanitizer was not at 100 ppm. See sanitizer chart.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less: 1-door fridge at 45F.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable: - Wood pallet used for storage needs to be stained or painted. - Shelf by sink has wood top that needs stained or painted.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided: Multiple thermometers were not accurate or were missing. Replace with accurate thermometers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition: Dispose of all scratched teflon skillets.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition: Rusty shelving in 1-door fridge needs replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid, food, or ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required: Clean tray on soda dispenser.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately: -Clean inside all coolers. -Clean all prep tables and cutting boards. -Clean spice bins.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately: -Clean all shelving in kitchen, sushi station and in walk in cooler. -Clean step stool. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination: Multiple single use items stored on floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --- Handwash sink on prep line not working. - Sink by soda dispenser did not have soap or paper towels. - Cook using dishwash sink for handwashing.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair: -Urinal in men's room was out of order. -Women's restroom out of order.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation: Men's room fan not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.: Entire kitchen needs deep cleaning.--Physical facilities (loors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not maintained in good repair. - Ceiling in kitchen is missing drywall. - Existing drywall in poor condition.
Lighting. — --Existing light fixtures did not provide adequate illumination: In cook and prep areas.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back screen door was not closed tightly.
